    "thinking": "Although the cursor tracker does not detect the cursor during this period, visual evidence in the video shows the browser tab 'Get an electronic travel authorisation (ETA) to visit the UK' becoming highlighted at 43300ms, followed by the appearance of a tab preview tooltip.
